content.en:
Wandering Realm.

Ye Tian entered here and found that there were many treasure lands here, but most of them were useful to the Devouring Clan, and with the departure of the Devouring Clan's Wandering Domain Ancestor, these treasure lands were almost deserted.

Ye Tian was not a real Devouring Clan, he was just a copied Devouring Clan, so he had no interest in other treasure lands, so he went straight to the Soul Stone Tablet of the Wandering Realm.

Soon, he came to the Soul Stone Tablet of the Wandering Realm.

The soul stele is 30,000 zhang high, 10,000 zhang wide, and the whole is black and gold.

According to Killing Wind, the soul stele will suck in the soul, and the internal space of the mixed stone stele contains terrifying special energy, this special energy has great benefits to the soul, but it also has corrosive properties, if it can't withstand the erosion, it will be manipulated by the soul stele and become the puppet of the soul stele.

"My soul is very tenacious, not necessarily worse than the soul of the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, and I have mastered the Extreme Dao inheritance, and with the Extreme Dao inheritance, a mere soul stone tablet can't control my soul at all!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Of course, there is a more important reason, his soul also has a mysterious talent for replication, so it is unlikely that his soul will be manipulated by foreign objects.

Wow!

Ye Tian's soul walked out of his body, almost no different from his body.

In addition to the soul of the main body, the soul of the devouring clan in the replicating body also came out.

After all, if you enter the Wandering Realm this time, if the soul of the Devouring Clan's body does not progress, it will definitely arouse the suspicion of Killing Wind!

Therefore, he also let the soul of the Devouring Clan also enter the soul stone tablet refining.

Ye Tian, who was in the soul state, easily entered the soul stone tablet and came to the inner space of the soul stone tablet.

As soon as he entered this space, countless special soul energies poured in, constantly refining Ye Tian's soul.

This kind of soul energy was pure, but it was full of aggression, as if it wanted to erase Ye Tian's spiritual intelligence.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to operate the soul method in the Extreme Dao Inheritance, constantly absorbing these soul energies, no matter how terrifying the aggressive energy was, there was no way to erase Ye Tian's spiritual wisdom.

"Sure enough, it's a good place, at this refining speed, it won't be long before I can condense my soul into an immortal soul!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Time passed little by little, Ye Tian's ontological soul and the soul of the Devouring Clan were refining together, and the soul method with the Extreme Dao inheritance was blessed, and the cultivation was very smooth.

In a flash, it is 10,000 years.

this day.

Ye Tian's body soul exuded a black-gold light, as if the eternal and immortal light shone through the ages, full of supreme aura.

At the same time, Ye Tian's soul continued to condense and compress, and all kinds of impurities hidden in the depths of his soul dissipated, and his soul became more and more pure.

Abrupt.

A black-gold rule surrounded Ye Tian's soul, and then completely merged with the soul.

This rule is an indestructible rule, which means that Ye Tian has condensed into an immortal soul, but it is only an immortal soul realm that has condensed an immortal rule.

But even so, Ye Tian's soul was far more powerful than in the past, and he met the conditions for promotion to the Extreme Dao level.

"The forbidden body has been tempered to ten percent perfection, and the soul has reached the immortal soul, and then as long as the forbidden Dao power is completely transformed into the forbidden power, I can step into the extreme Dao realm at the level of the invincible Dao Ancestor, which can be called the Extreme Dao Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At present, seventy percent of his forbidden Dao power has been converted into forbidden power, so it won't be too long before all the forbidden Dao power can be converted into forbidden power.

This is the easiest of the three conditions to meet, but it is put last.

"It's a pity that the soul potential of the Devouring Clan is too low, and it is only a few times stronger!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

But this is also very normal, after all, it is a copied body, and its soul is also the same as Tengfeng, how much soul potential does an invincible Dao Ancestor of the Devouring Clan have!

"It's time to leave, there's no point in continuing, this soul stone tablet is of little use to the immortal soul!"

Ye Tian's soul returned to the essence of the outside world.

Immediately, the copy body left the Wandering Realm with Ye Tian's body.

And at this time, the killing wind is long gone.

However, Ye Tian was still cautious, and only when he approached the Xuanxu Ancient Realm with his body did he let the body come out.

Subsequently.

The copy body returned to the Devouring Realm, and the main body returned to the Xuan Void Ancient Realm, and everything went very smoothly.
